prompt: Use case: stylized-concept. Asset type: runtime 2x2 full-body character atlas for a mobile 2D-in-3D isometric game. Primary request: four separated full-body characters arranged in a precise 2x2 grid with generous padding: top-left original roadwarden heroine Mira with blue cloak and gold lantern magic; top-right crimson thorn skulk enemy; bottom-left square grey oathless stone brute; bottom-right teal marsh candle wisp. Style/medium: polished hand-painted 2D fantasy game art, crisp alpha, high contrast, readable at small mobile size. Composition/framing: each character centered head-to-toe in its cell, same camera angle and baseline. Constraints: transparent background, no text, no watermark, no UI, no franchise resemblance.

Use case: stylized-concept. Asset type: character rig part sheet for mobile 2D-in-3D billboard animation. Primary request: original roadwarden heroine Mira, blue travel cloak, brass lantern magic, short sling staff. Generate separated parts on transparent background: full body reference, torso/body, head, front arm, back arm, front leg, back leg, sling staff/weapon, gold-teal casting glow. Style/medium: stylized hand-painted isometric mobile RPG sprite art, crisp alpha edges, chunky readable silhouette. Composition/framing: each part isolated with padding but matching the same scale, three-quarter camera angle, and foot baseline; pivots should be visually clear at shoulders, hips, and hand. Constraints: no labels, no text, no watermark, no background.

Use case: stylized-concept. Asset type: enemy rig part sheet for mobile 2D-in-3D billboard animation. Primary request: separated transparent parts for three original enemies: crimson thorn skulk, grey oathless stone brute, teal marsh candle wisp. For each enemy include full body reference, body/torso, front limb, back limb, front leg or lower tendril, back leg or lower tendril, attack hand/club/glow. Style/medium: stylized hand-painted isometric mobile game art, crisp alpha, chunky silhouettes. Composition/framing: parts grouped by enemy, same scale and camera angle within each enemy set, clear shoulder/hip/hand pivots. Constraints: no labels, no text, no watermark, no background.

Use case: stylized-concept. Asset type: transparent mobile game character sprite. Primary request: original fantasy roadwarden heroine named Mira, compact readable in-game sprite, blue travel cloak, brass road lantern, short ashwood sling staff, determined expression, warm gold identity accents. Style/medium: stylized 3D-to-2D painterly game sprite with crisp silhouette and clean value grouping. Composition/framing: isometric three-quarter view, full body, centered, generous padding, no crop. Lighting/mood: warm lantern rim light against cool twilight shadows. Constraints: readable at 64px, chunky silhouette, no text, no logo, no copyrighted franchise resemblance.

Use case: stylized-concept. Asset type: transparent mobile game enemy sprite. Primary request: original twilight road-haunt thorn skulk enemy, low triangular body, thorny shoulders, glowing small eyes. Style/medium: stylized isometric 3D-to-2D mobile game sprite, crisp outline, painterly surface. Composition/framing: full body, centered, readable at 48px, strong triangular silhouette. Lighting/mood: warm rim light, cool shadow body. Constraints: no gore, no text, no logo, avoid thin details.

Use case: stylized-concept. Asset type: transparent mobile game enemy sprite. Primary request: original oathless stone brute, square heavy road-haunt made from cracked watch stones and milestone fragments. Style/medium: stylized isometric 3D-to-2D mobile game sprite, chunky readable planes, crisp outline. Composition/framing: full body, centered, readable at 56px, strong square silhouette. Lighting/mood: pale moon edge light and faint gold rune glow. Constraints: no text, no logo, no thin chips that disappear on mobile.

Use case: stylized-concept. Asset type: transparent mobile game enemy sprite. Primary request: original marsh candle wisp, floating teal flame spirit with two bright readable eye shapes. Style/medium: stylized isometric 3D-to-2D mobile game sprite, crisp outer contour despite glow. Composition/framing: centered, readable at 44px, teardrop silhouette. Lighting/mood: teal flame core with warm lantern rim. Constraints: no smoke wisps thinner than 8 percent of sprite width, no text, no logo.

Use case: stylized-concept. Asset type: transparent mobile game pickup icon. Primary request: teal relic shard XP pickup, original fantasy road journey collectible. Style/medium: isometric icon, crisp outline, simple gemstone planes, warm lantern highlight. Composition/framing: centered object with generous padding, readable at 32px. Constraints: no text, no logo, avoid jewelry complexity.

Use case: stylized-concept. Asset type: transparent mobile game pickup icon. Primary request: red waybread heart health pickup, half bread charm half heart shape, readable instantly as healing. Style/medium: isometric icon, crisp outline, warm fantasy-road palette. Composition/framing: centered, readable at 32px. Constraints: no text, no logo, simple silhouette.

Use case: stylized-concept. Asset type: transparent environment prop sprite. Primary request: mossy fantasy road waystone with one simple glowing route mark, original design. Style/medium: stylized isometric mobile game prop, chunky silhouette, low visual noise. Composition/framing: centered, full prop, readable at 48px. Constraints: no readable letters, no text, no logo.

Use case: stylized-concept. Asset type: square mobile game combat backdrop. Primary request: Whisperbough Verge, original magical road journey battlefield, twilight enchanted forest edge with emerald moss and old road stones. Style/medium: stylized isometric game backdrop, painterly but low-noise. Composition/framing: clear empty combat space in center, detail pushed to outer third, seamless-feeling ground plane. Lighting/mood: cool twilight shadows with small warm lantern accents. Constraints: no characters, no text, no logo, no dark unreadable center.
